scope: MiMo V2.5 JANG/JANGTQ UI/API reasoning request construction
stale explicit Thinking On chat override suppression

root_cause.bad_behavior: Explicit enableThinking=true was forwarded for remote/gateway sessions even when local model detection reported supportsThinking=false.
root_cause.why_it_matters: MiMo keeps a think_xml parser for cleanup/tool separation but current release contract sets supportsThinking=false because thinking-on live proof produced hidden-only/no-reasoning behavior. Parser presence must not make stale UI overrides send enable_thinking=true.

behavior_after_fix: If detection explicitly says supportsThinking=false, panel chat IPC omits enable_thinking even for stale explicit Thinking On overrides.
Unknown remote providers still preserve explicit enable_thinking on/off unless strict-provider filtering rejects the field.
Reasoning-capable local/remote models still preserve explicit enable_thinking.
MiMo tool parser and think_xml cleanup parser remain available; this does not disable tool parsing or marker cleanup.

verification.command: cd panel && npm exec vitest -- run tests/request-builder.test.ts
cd panel && npm exec tsc -- --noEmit --pretty false

proven: request builder suppresses stale remote explicit enable_thinking when supportsThinking=false
existing tool_choice downgrade behavior for non-Gemma loopback remote vMLX sessions remains green
remote explicit thinking for supported/unknown providers remains green
not_proven_here: installed app has been rebuilt with this panel IPC fix
installed app MiMo JANGTQ_2 thinking/tools/cache proof rerun after rebuild
MiMo JANGTQ_2 artifact literal exactness fixed
MiMo media semantic release quality fixed
other_agent_next: After app rebuild, rerun installed-app MiMo JANGTQ_2 Responses tools/cache proof and inspect CHAT_DIAG request_shape; stale Thinking On should not produce enable_thinking for supportsThinking=false MiMo.
Do not mark MiMo reasoning-on green from this fix; current contract is honest suppression for unsupported thinking, not successful reasoning.
Continue artifact/profile work for literal exactness separately; do not mask it with parser or JSON repair.
